title: phyllanthus profusus
intro: Phyllanthus profusus, also known as Phyllanthus niruri or Chanca piedra, is a tropical plant native to the Amazon region and other parts of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to dissolve kidney stones and gallstones due to its high concentration of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Phyllanthus profusus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus profusus can be made into teas, capsules, or tablets, and are often used to support liver and kidney health, as well as to aid in the treatment of various digestive issues.
